name: pluto
description: Discover candidates, check monthly credit balances, and act on explicit candidate interest through Pluto.

interface.shortDescription: Discover candidates, check credits, and express interest.
interface.longDescription: Run metered candidate searches, check your exact monthly credit balance, and act on a candidate you explicitly select. Internal selections enter TalentPluto's prospecting flow; external selections can reveal a freshly enriched, committed professional email without sending outreach.
defaultPrompt: Find senior account executives in New York with SaaS experience.
Find former SDRs who became account executives.
Find sales leaders with MEDDICC experience.
How many Pluto credits do I have left, and when do they reset?
Express interest in the candidate I selected from the Pluto results for the role I chose.
